title: QuickSweetPoach
description: A quick and easy diabetic-friendly dessert featuring sweet smoked paprika, poached in a minimal amount of time.

ingredients.name: Sugar-free fruit jam
ingredients.notes: Use a sugar-free variety to keep it diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Full-fat for richer flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Whole milk yogurt
ingredients.notes: Reduced fat or plain, as desired.

ingredients.name: Vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and depth.

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine the sweet smoked paprika, sugar-free fruit jam, heavy cream, and vanilla extract.
Heat over medium heat until just boiling but not simmering. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer gently for 1-2 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Remove from heat and stir in whole milk yogurt to thicken slightly if desired.
